sourceMovie.title: Inheritance
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Inheritance works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Oldboy
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Inheritance clicked for you, Oldboy (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Inheritance?
faq.answer: Try Oldboy, Missing, Hereditary—each shares DNA with Inheritance while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Inheritance?
faq.answer: Inheritance (2020) is best described as Drama, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Inheritance worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
